Osc : Re: Code Enforcement In Scd 218 At 01:30 P.M. On April 18, 2003.
Off Calendar Feb-10-2004 Off Calendar

Osc : Re: Code Enforcement In Scd 218 At 01:30 P.M. On April 18, 2003.
Off Calendar Dec-19-2003 Continued To Feb-13-04 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for Code Enforcement hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Brenda Fields.
Appearances:
Timothy Benetti, Esq. City Attorney for Plaintiff People of the State of California and CCSF.
Tim Larsen, Esq. for Defendant Josef J. Pohl, also present.
This matter is continued to Feb. 13, 2004 at 01:30 p.m. in Dept. 218, no appearances are necessary, if no problems with the final sign-off
